name: pratyabhijna-creative-engine
description: Pratyabhijna x Active Inference creative-cognition engine v0.2. Adds Haiku as a first-class generative substrate (apples-to-apples ablation with Claude Haiku), a causal two-pass-always vimarsa revision loop, signed apohana, prompt/sampler parity with bare baseline, and four benchmark arms (local_bare, local_cascade, haiku_bare, haiku_cascade). Ships 15 MCP tools, 5 skills, 5 agents, 5 slash commands, and 3 lifecycle hooks.
